title: Rewrite the entire RoleRouter as pattern-matched heads (route + permission)
prompt: Refactor both functions (`route/1` and `permission/2`) in test_fixtures/cond_role_router.ex as multi-clause function heads. For route/1, pattern-match `%{role: ..., active: ...}`. For permission/2, pattern-match `nil`, admin, editor-as-owner (via pinning), editor-read, viewer-read, and catch-all. Output the complete refactored module as `defmodule MyApp.RoleRouter do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Two-function module-wide refactor with pinning subtlety. Consistent philosophy across both functions.
